_publications._publicationTitle: Synergistic effect of Nutlin-3 combined with MG-132 on schwannoma cells through restoration of merlin and p53 tumour suppressors.

_contextSnippet: The treatment with MG-132 conferred decreases in the viabilities of normal human Schwann cells (HSCs) with an initial dose of 5 μM at all time-points; cell viabilities were however dramatically reduced with continued doses
details: Cell viability decreased with MG-132 treatment starting at 5 μM, with dramatic reduction at continued doses
